---
title: "Boredom in Recovery Worksheet"
format: html
---

## Understanding Boredom in Recovery

Often people who stop using drugs say life feels boring. Some reasons for this feeling include:

-   A structured, routine life feels different from a lifestyle built around substance use.\
-   Brain chemical changes during recovery can make people feel listless (or bored).\
-   People who use substances often experience extreme emotional swings (high to low and back again). Normal emotions can feel flat by comparison.

People who have been abstinent for a long time rarely complain of continual boredom. The problem of boredom in recovery does improve over time. In the meantime, trying new and engaging activities can help reduce feelings of boredom.

![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/rain.jpeg?raw=true){fig-align="center"}

### List five recreational activities you would like to pursue:

1.  

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

2.  

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

3.  

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

4.  

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

5.  

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Reflect on the following questions:

-   Have you started doing things that you enjoyed before using drugs?
-   Have you begun any new activities that interest you?

::: callout
### Here are some tips to reduce feelings of boredom:

-   Recognize that a structured, routine life feels different from a lifestyle built around substance use.
-   Make sure you are scheduling activities. Forcing yourself to write down daily activities helps you fit in more interesting experiences.
-   Try not to become complacent in recovery. Do something that will further your growth. Sometimes boredom results from not challenging yourself enough in your daily living.
:::

***Which of the suggestions listed above might work for you?***
